response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development, but lacks the required C++ development on Windows platform (only mentions C/C++ briefly in an unspecified context). Domain expertise in capital markets or fixed income is not demonstrated, and SQL experience is mentioned but not with SQL Server/Oracle. The resume also lacks clear evidence of investment banking or capital markets domain knowledge.
strengths: Strong general software development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Proven ability to work in agile teams and follow best practices like TDD and CI/CD
Experience with low-latency applications and high-performance systems
concerns: No demonstrated C++ development experience on Windows platform (required skill)
Lacks domain expertise in capital markets, investment banking, or fixed income
No mention of SQL Server or Oracle (only general SQL experience)
